REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-20-2023 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** RICHARD MILLER, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF CREDIT CORP SOLUTIONS INC. VIA COURTCALL. DEFENDANT MARIA ROY, SELF-REPRESENTED LITIGANT, APPEARING IN PERSON. MR. MILLER, WHO IS APPEARING TELEPHONICALLY, IS PHYSICALLY LOCATED IN SAN DIEGO. ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN PERSON IN THE COURTROOM AND READY TO PROCEED WITH A TRIAL ASSIGNMENT. THEREFORE, THE COURT DISMISSED THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)
